data.description:
## What
unlink (standalone 532-LOC script): pair-scoped, removes most-recently-created link, computes net-effective state, writes UNLINK matching the format ticket-graph.py reads. Must target promoted endpoint. test suites covering unlink.

Port behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library. Default stays bash.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] unlink ported to rebar._commands, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Command's bash suite(s) green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Error strings + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash
data.title: Tier B: Port ticket-link.sh unlink (net-effective state + UNLINK) to rebar._commands
